calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Greg Groeneveld, Esq. (415-308-3637) appears as couinsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF DEREK CALIOS' Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs is GRANTED in the full amount sought. Defendant Repairpal must pay $6,624 in fees and $206.10 in costs to plaintiff. No opposition filed. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
